headline: Owlet's Q4 Loss Narrower Than Expected, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: OWLT posts narrower-than-expected Q4 loss and 29.6% revenue growth on Dream product demand and Owlet360 subscriptions. Yet shares tumble after hours.

headline: Best Health & Fitness Stocks to Buy Now for Strong Growth
summary: GRMN, HLF and AMWL stand out in a booming wellness market as wearables, nutrition products and telehealth platforms reshape how consumers pursue healthier lives.
